name: hypermnesia-mcp
description: Persistent memory and cognitive profiling for Claude — remembers across sessions automatically. Scientific retrieval backed by 72 published references.
long_description: Cortex gives Claude a durable, scientifically-grounded memory. It stores decisions, lessons, and context across sessions and retrieves them with a hybrid WRRF fusion (vector + full-text + trigram + heat + recency) reranked by a cross-encoder. Its 23 neuroscience-grounded mechanisms are drawn from a 72-reference bibliography (spreading activation, synaptic tagging, neuromodulation, LTP/LTD, predictive-coding write gates). This connector exposes 43 memory tools and runs fully local with zero external services using the built-in SQLite backend; advanced users can point it at PostgreSQL + pgvector. For the automatic session-lifecycle memory (injection at session start, auto-capture, compaction checkpointing), install the companion Claude Code plugin — its hooks drive that automation, which the MCP bundle format does not carry.

tools.name: query_methodology
tools.title: Query Methodology Profile
tools.description: Return the cognitive profile + hot memories for the current domain.

tools.name: remember
tools.title: Remember
tools.description: Store a memory through the predictive-coding write gate.

tools.name: recall
tools.title: Recall Memories
tools.description: Retrieve memories via hybrid WRRF fusion + cross-encoder rerank.

tools.name: consolidate
tools.title: Consolidate Memory
tools.description: Run maintenance: decay, compression, CLS, sleep compute.

tools.name: checkpoint
tools.title: Checkpoint State
tools.description: Save/restore working state for hippocampal replay.

tools.name: forget
tools.title: Forget Memory
tools.description: Delete a memory (guarded by protection flag).

tools.name: narrative
tools.title: Generate Narrative
tools.description: Generate a project narrative from stored memories.

tools.name: get_causal_chain
tools.title: Get Causal Chain
tools.description: Trace entity relationships through the knowledge graph.

tools.name: wiki_write
tools.title: Write Wiki Page
tools.description: Create a first-class wiki page (ADR, spec, note).

store_backend.title: Storage backend
store_backend.description: Where Cortex stores memory. "sqlite" (default) runs fully local with zero setup. "postgresql" uses an external PostgreSQL + pgvector database (set the URL below). "auto" tries PostgreSQL then falls back to SQLite.

database_url.title: PostgreSQL URL (advanced, optional)
database_url.description: Only used when the storage backend is "postgresql" or "auto". Example: postgresql://user:password@host:5432/cortex. Leave empty to use the local SQLite backend.
